'''Kieran Buchanan''' (born 26 January 1999) is a {{rlnt|Scotland}} international [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce|wg}}er or {{rlp|fb}} for the [[York Knights]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].

He has previously played for [[Hull F.C.]] in the [[Super League]] and spent time on loan from [[Hull F.C.|Hull]] at [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] in [[RFL League One|League 1]].

==Background==
Buchanan was born in [[Kingston upon Hull]], East Riding of Yorkshire, England. He is of Scottish descent.

==Career==
===Hull FC===
In 2019, he made his [[Super League]] début for [[Hull F.C.]] against the [[Catalans Dragons]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP2921747|title=Super League: Hull FC V Catalans Dragons|publisher=BBC}}</ref>

===Batley Bulldogs===
On 11 September 2020, it was announced that Buchanan would join the [[Batley Bulldogs]] for the 2021 season.<ref>{{cite web|publisher=Hull Daily Mail|date=11 Sep 2020|accessdate=26 Dec 2020|title=Hull FC youngster Kieran Buchanan agrees move to Championship club for 2021|url=https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/kieran-buchanan-hull-fc-batley-4508949}}</ref>

===York Knights===
On 12 November 2024, it was reported that he had signed for [[York Knights|York]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a two-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=12 Nov 2024|author=Drew Darbyshire|title=Former Hull FC youngster makes cross-Championship switch for 2025|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-hull-fc-kieran-buchanan-championship-york-knights-transfer-move}}</ref>
On 7 June 2025, he played in York's 1895 Cup final victory over [[Featherstone Rovers|Featherstone]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cm26dp2l3vvo |title=York pip Featherstone in extra time to win 1895 Cup |work=BBC Sport |date=7 June 2025 |access-date=8 June 2025}}</ref>

===International===
He made his international debut for {{rlnt|Scotland}} on 16 October 2022 in their opening fixture of the [[2021 Men's Rugby League World Cup|2021 World Cup]], a 28-4 defeat to {{rlnt|Italy}}.<ref>{{cite web|website=BBC Sport|date=16 October 2022|access-date=13 November 2024|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/63279401|title=Rugby League World Cup: Scotland humbled 28-4 by lowly Italy}}</ref>
